message.content:
Analyze failing tests and coverage gaps in this NestJS project. Read the following files and report back with their exact content (relevant sections):

1. Read `src/modules/opensearch/opensearch-neural.service.ts` - focus on:
   - The `searchProducts` method (full implementation)
   - The `onModuleInit` method
   - The `modelId` field and how it's set/checked

2. Read `test/opensearch/opensearch-neural.service.e2e-spec.ts` - focus on:
   - The "should throw error when model ID is not available" test (around line 315-355)
   - The "should search successfully when model is available (mocked)" test (around line 355-400)
   - The "should limit results to requested size" test (around line 490-515)

3. Read `src/modules/rest/neural-search/neural-search.service.ts` - full file

4. Read `test/rest/neural-search.service.e2e-spec.ts` - focus on:
   - The "should forward limit parameter as size" test (around line 400-430)
   - The "should work with use-case names containing spaces" test (around line 460-490)
   - The use-case data/configuration being referenced

5. Run: `npm run test:e2e:coverage 2>&1 | tail -80` to see coverage report

Report the exact content of each section so I can understand the bugs.

content.text: I'll systematically read through these files and analyze the test coverage. Let me start by gathering the information you need.
Now let me run the coverage command to see the full report.
Perfect! Now I can see the failures. Let me search for the constant that's referenced to understand the test data issue:

content.content:
